aplQuery:
['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where service == 'moltnet-rest-api'
| where status >= 500
| summarize server_errors = count() by bin(_time, 5m), service, route, status
description: Actionable server-side REST API failures. Investigate the grouped route/service in the moltnet traces/logs dataset, then run the Node-RED Axiom alert triage flow if the alert is not immediately explained. This intentionally excludes routine 401/404 client/auth noise.
name: MoltNet REST API 5xx by route
